violations.text: Hot holding box was observed in poor repair. Unit was only able to reach an ambient temperature of 117 degrees Fahrenheit. Establishment has a steam well and the capacity to convert oven into hot holding unit. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The kitchen hood vents have an accumulation of soil residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2026
